titleStmt.title: SII 15.615: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 615. (B.K. No. 91 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the inner wall of the Pārśvanātha temple.
This is dated Śaka 1197, Yuva, Vaiśākha ba. 13, Thursday, corresponding to 1275 A.D., April 25.
It records the death, by the vow of Sanyāsa, of Amṛitayya, son of Mahāpradhāna, Heggaḍe Dēvaṇṇa who was a minister and Bāhattara-niyōgādhipati of Tiḷakarasa of Saraṭūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcanaṁ jīyā
trailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti śrī
kuṁtaḷēsminsuravara nikarairādarā�tsēvya
mānē dēśē khyātaṁ dharāyāṁ beḷuvala Iti
yaddrāṣṭramutkṟuṣṭasaukhyaṁ tasminvistī¨rṇnarāṣṭrē sakaḷajananutē sārasaṁ
patsamagrē jainānāṁ vāsabhūtē puramajani mahatsaṁpadā sausvara
. tasmin purē sakaḷalōkalalāmabhūtē rājā samasti tiḷakākhya
virājamānaḥ rājāṁbikāpatihitāsyalasatkulastrī
strīṇāṁ varōruguṇabhūṣaṇabhūṣitāṁgī . tayō�
putraḥ sākṣānmadanasadṛśō rūpavibhavaiḥ sphuratkī¨rtyā kāntyā nirupa
ma Iti khyāti tsamagraḥ sadvidyaiḥ sarasa caritaiḥ
saumyavadanaḥ suvi dhaurēyakavijanamatō darasayat
tasya rājñaḥ samagrasya vaibhavasyēva kāraṇaḥ pradhānasaṁpadaṁ prāptōdē
varājēti nāmabhāk . tasya bhā¨ryyā guṇaśrēṣṭhā varisṭhā rucirai¨rggu
ṇai¨rbhāgāṁbikā tayōḥ putrā
dha¨rmmōdyōganiraṁtaraṁ niyatamāvajrasya tasyānujaḥ sōyaṁ cā
mṛtanāmadhēyaniyataṁ lakṣmīdharōyaṁ tadātma
guṇabhoṣaṇāṁ kavibudhaḥ saṁstoyamānaḥ sadā
dānasuciraṁ va¨rttaṁtēvanimaṁḍaḷē . tē sa¨rvvē dē
vasēnaśrī varamunivarāt prāptasaddha¨rmmamā¨rggāḥ śrēyōmā¨rggē pra
śastepraṇihitamanasaḥ satyasāhityasārāḥ tēṣōtkṛṣṭhēṣu
jainēṣvamaraparivṛtaiḥ stūyamānāpadānaḥ saṁprā
ptassārabhūtaṁ surapatibhavanaṁ sōmṛtākhyaḥ sujainaḥ .
tyaktvāṁtaraṁgabahiraṁgaparigrahaughaṁ labdhvā
bōdha saṁbhavamātmabhāvaṁ dhyāyaṁniraṁjananijātma
jīvātmatatvaṁ śrēyōgatē jinapatē varasaṁnusacāmṛ
tākhyaḥ . yuvasāvatsara vaiśākhē bahuḷē cāpi trayō
daśī guruvārē cāmṛtākhyōyaṁ saṁnyāsēna divaṁgataḥ .
svastiśrī sakava¨rṣa 1197 neya yuva saṁva
tsarada vaiśākha ba 13 guruvāradalu śrīmatsaraṭūra tiḷa
karasara bhujādō¨rddhaṁḍa sanmaṁḍana śrī manmahāpradhānaṁ bā
hattaraniyōgādhipati niyōgadhuraṁdhara maṁtrila
lāmanappa heggaḍe dēvaṁṇnana maga Amritaiyyanu sva¨rgakke saṁdanu .
maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . śrī . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 15.615 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
